raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a philosophical claim about the nature of time and possession",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "only the present can be properly possessed or lost",
    "past and future exist outside the domain of personal loss or parting",
    "human concern should be limited to the present moment"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent within a present-focused metaphysical framework but relies on stipulative definitions of 'part with'",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "AI systems must be designed to redirect user attention exclusively to present actions without diminishing planning or memory functions",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is taken to imply that reflection on the past or anticipation of the future has no legitimate value for human decision-making"
}
